prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, SBUX has an annualized volatility around 25-30%. For a 6-day period, this translates to approximately 3-4% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes minimal drift with slight positive bias. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with estimated volatility, where 6-day volatility is roughly 7-8% (sqrt(6) * daily vol). The intervals widen appropriately for higher confidence levels.
